annotation_policy: See attachment_gold_annotation_spec.md for full rules. Singular form, lowercase, merged synonyms, no enumeration context.

gold_attachments.label: Novaris Busbar-583
gold_attachments.rationale: Named busbar asset under inspection — top-level asset

gold_attachments.label: contamination
gold_attachments.rationale: Core fault under investigation on busbar surface

gold_attachments.label: coolant leak
gold_attachments.rationale: Named fault type — one of three possible contamination origins

gold_attachments.label: plating damage
gold_attachments.rationale: Damage to busbar surface plating revealed after cleaning — fault

gold_attachments.label: foreign object
gold_attachments.rationale: Unspecified foreign material — one of three contamination origins

gold_attachments.label: metal debris
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific contaminant type: metallic particles

gold_attachments.label: carbonized dust
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific contaminant type: dust with carbon content from electrical activity

gold_attachments.label: assembly paste
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific contaminant type: residual paste from manufacturing

gold_attachments.label: busbar span
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific length section of busbar where contamination is located

gold_attachments.label: busbar surface
gold_attachments.rationale: Outer face of the busbar that is inspected and cleaned

gold_attachments.label: busbar face
gold_attachments.rationale: Specific planar face of busbar kept in same view as cover edge

gold_attachments.label: busbar section
gold_attachments.rationale: Clean neighboring section of busbar used for comparison

gold_attachments.label: insulator cavity
gold_attachments.rationale: Internal cavity within insulator — check for contamination migration

gold_attachments.label: fastener zone
gold_attachments.rationale: Area surrounding fasteners that must be exposed for inspection

gold_attachments.label: neighboring hardware
gold_attachments.rationale: Hardware components adjacent to busbar — recontamination risk

gold_attachments.label: accessible face
gold_attachments.rationale: Externally reachable face where contamination may be visible

gold_attachments.label: insulator cover
gold_attachments.rationale: Structural cover over insulator — Housing > Component

gold_attachments.label: insulator shield
gold_attachments.rationale: Structural shield covering busbar — Housing > Component

gold_attachments.label: cover edge
gold_attachments.rationale: Edge of insulator cover kept in same view as busbar face — housing feature

gold_attachments.label: shield edge
gold_attachments.rationale: Edge of insulator shield — check for trapped debris — housing feature

gold_attachments.label: stain pattern
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable discoloration pattern saved as contamination evidence

gold_attachments.label: contaminant pattern
gold_attachments.rationale: Distribution pattern of contaminant material preserved for origin inference

gold_attachments.label: staining
gold_attachments.rationale: Residual discoloration after cleaning — observable evidence

gold_attachments.label: heat mark
gold_attachments.rationale: Observable thermal discoloration on cleaned surface

gold_attachments.label: coolant residue
gold_attachments.rationale: Residue from coolant fluid — Coolant > Component

gold_attachments.label: clamp interface
gold_attachments.rationale: Connection interface at clamp point — contamination migration boundary

gold_attachments.label: terminal joint
gold_attachments.rationale: Joint at terminal — check for contamination migration

gold_attachments.label: fastener stack
gold_attachments.rationale: Stacked fastener assembly — Fastener > Component

gold_attachments.label: fastener
gold_attachments.rationale: General fastener — may shift and cause recontamination

gold_attachments.label: assembled state
gold_attachments.rationale: Final assembled condition of hardware — concluded state

gold_attachments.label: shield coverage
gold_attachments.rationale: Concluded extent of shield covering busbar at release boundary

gold_attachments.label: release boundary
gold_attachments.rationale: Acceptance criteria for closing the review — concluded acceptance state
